javax.imageio/ImageReader/getTileGridXOf.description:
Returns the X coordinate of the upper-left corner of tile (0,
0) in the given image.

info.excerpt:
Returns the X coordinate of the upper-left corner of tile (0,
0) in the given image.

javax.imageio/ImageWriteParam/getTileGri.name: getTileGridXOffset
javax.imageio/ImageWriteParam/getTileGri.description:
Returns the horizontal tile grid offset of an image as it will
be written to the output stream.

info.excerpt:
Returns the horizontal tile grid offset of an image as it will
be written to the output stream.

by the current set of registered writers.
